source.title: The Role of Gravitational Energy Flux in Cosmic Acceleration

source_claims_recorded: TEGR gives a framework in which gravitational energy and energy flux are treated as physical quantities
Bondi-Sachs radiative space-times are used to analyze total gravitational energy and energy flux in asymptotic regions
the total energy-momentum flux is obtained from a conservation identity and boundary surface integral
the paper reports localized energy-flux profiles and net negative gravitational-energy contribution in representative radiative configurations
admissible_use: candidate source map for the physical flux-identity / flux-sign slot
source context for the restricted analytic estimate conditional package
background for gravitational radiation energy-flux language
